CustomField.description: Integration Checks for 2c9. Any errors displayed will result in the Integration not running for this Shift.
CustomField.formula: IF( ISBLANK(sirenum__Approved_By_Client__c), "Shift Not Approved, ", "") + IF( ISBLANK( sirenum__Contact__c), "No Contact, ", "") + IF( ISBLANK(sirenum__Site__r.sirenum__Timezone__c), "No Site Timezone, ", "") + IF( AND( ISPICKVAL(sirenum__Team__r.tc9_ext_sirint__Inherit_Rate_Calculator_Values_From__c, "Assignment"), ISBLANK( Minimum_Pay_Rate__c) ), "No Minimum Pay Rate Found, ", "") + IF( ISBLANK(tc9_ext_sirint__Public_Holiday_Calendar__c), "No Public Holiday Calendar, ", "") + IF( AND( ISBLANK(tc9_ext_sirint__TSE_Start_Date__c), ISBLANK(tc9_ext_sirint__TSE_End_Date__c), ISBLANK(tc9_ext_sirint__TSE_Start_Time__c), ISBLANK(tc9_ext_sirint__TSE_End_Time__c) ), "No Integration Times, ", "") + IF( OR( tc9_ext_sirint__TSE_First_Break_Time__c < tc9_ext_sirint__TSE_Start_Time__c, tc9_ext_sirint__TSE_Second_Break_Time__c < tc9_ext_sirint__TSE_Start_Time__c, tc9_ext_sirint__TSE_First_Break_Time__c > tc9_ext_sirint__TSE_End_Time__c, tc9_ext_sirint__TSE_Second_Break_Time__c > tc9_ext_sirint__TSE_End_Time__c, tc9_ext_sirint__TSE_Second_Break_Time__c < tc9_ext_sirint__TSE_First_Break_Time__c, AND( NOT(ISBLANK(tc9_ext_sirint__TSE_First_Break_Time__c)), sirenum__Break_Length__c = 0 ), AND( NOT(ISBLANK(tc9_ext_sirint__TSE_Second_Break_Time__c)), tc9_ext_sirint__Second_Break_Length__c = 0 ), AND(ISBLANK(tc9_ext_sirint__TSE_First_Break_Time__c),NOT(ISBLANK(tc9_ext_sirint__TSE_Second_Break_Time__c))) ),"Potential Break Issue, ","")
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Integration Checks for 2c9. Any errors displayed will result in the Integration not running for this Shift.
CustomField.label: Integration Error Checks
